---
name: ✨ Feature / New Skill Request
about: Suggest a new skill or feature improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Skill / Feature Description

A clear description of what you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Use Case

Describe the problem this skill would solve:
- What task are you trying to automate?
- What does the current output look like without this skill?
- What should the ideal output look like?

## 📋 Proposed Skill Structure

```
new-skill-name/
├── SKILL.md
├── scripts/
│   └── ...
└── references/
    └── ...
```

## 🔗 References

- Links to relevant documentation, tools, or examples

## ✅ Would you be willing to contribute this skill?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to build this!
- [ ] No, but I'd love for someone else to
